gold: CALL { MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:hasSpouse]->(m0:Character {name: 'Shiklah'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Character)-[r1:memberOf]->(m1:Organization {name: 'Mercs for Money'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name
pred: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE (c)-[:hasSpouse]->(:Character {name: 'Shiklah'}) OR (c)-[:memberOf]->(o:Organization {name: 'Mercs for Money'}) RETURN DISTINCT c.name

question: How many distinct locations are organizations based in?
gold: MATCH (n:Location)<-[r0:basedIn]-(m0:Organization) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)
pred:
MATCH (org:Organization)-[:basedIn]->(loc:Location)
RETURN count(DISTINCT loc) AS distinct_locations_count
